entities.name: WATER SCARCITY
entities.description: The lack of sufficient water resources to meet agricultural and human demands.

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: The region where water scarcity is exacerbated by climate variability and land use.

entities.name: CLIMATE VARIABILITY
entities.description: Fluctuations in climate patterns that increase agricultural water needs.

entities.name: INAPPROPRIATE LAND USE
entities.description: Inefficient or incorrect utilization of land resources.

entities.name: WATER PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The efficiency of water use in producing agricultural output.

entities.name: DEFICIT IRRIGATION
entities.description: An irrigation practice where water is applied below the full crop water requirement.

entities.name: SUPPLEMENTARY IRRIGATION
entities.description: The application of additional water to supplement rainfall.

entities.name: POTATO
entities.description: The crop Solanum tuberosum used to demonstrate water productivity tools.

entities.name: MARKET OPPORTUNITIES
entities.description: Economic incentives and demand for crops at different time periods.

entities.name: NORTHEASTERN ETHIOPIA
entities.description: The geographic area where the field experiment was conducted.

entities.name: AQUACROP
entities.description: A decision-support tool used for simulating crop water productivity and irrigation requirements.

entities.name: BELG SEASON
entities.description: The short rainfall season in Ethiopia occurring from February to May.

entities.name: MEHER SEASON
entities.description: The long rainfall season in Ethiopia occurring from July to October.

entities.name: CROP WATER SATISFACTION
entities.description: The level of water available to the crop relative to its requirement, measured as a percentage of ETc.

entities.name: BELETE POTATO
entities.description: A local potato variety used for the calibration of the AquaCrop model.

entities.name: NET IRRIGATION REQUIREMENTS
entities.description: The amount of irrigation water needed after accounting for effective precipitation.

entities.name: EFFECTIVE PRECIPITATION
entities.description: The portion of rainfall that is actually available for crop use.

entities.name: CROP WATER REQUIREMENT
entities.description: The total water needed by a crop for growth, denoted as ETc.

entities.name: POTATO TUBER YIELD
entities.description: The amount of potato tubers produced per unit area.

entities.name: WATER SUPPLY EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency with which irrigation water is supplied and used by the crop.

entities.name: NUMBER OF RAINFALL DAYS
entities.description: The frequency of rain events during the growing period.

entities.name: WATER USERS' ASSOCIATIONS
entities.description: Community organizations that manage and enforce irrigation recommendations.

entities.name: WATER SAVING APPROACHES
entities.description: Techniques and practices aimed at reducing water consumption in agriculture.

entities.name: DRY SPELLS
entities.description: Periods of time with little to no precipitation during the growth stages.

entities.name: IRRIGATION CONFLICT
entities.description: Disputes among water users regarding the allocation of irrigation water.

entities.name: INSTITUTIONAL SETTINGS
entities.description: The regulatory and organizational framework governing water management.

entities.name: MARKET INCENTIVES
entities.description: Financial or market-driven rewards that encourage the adoption of specific practices.

entities.name: IMPROVED IRRIGATION WATER MANAGEMENT PRACTICES
entities.description: Enhanced strategies for managing water to increase productivity and efficiency.

entities.name: STAGGERED PRODUCTION
entities.description: The practice of scheduling crop production at different times to align with market opportunities.
